message:
🐛 Fix build errors and GPU count calculations

- Add useMemo import to Cost.tsx
- Fix Compute, Nodes, and Operators pages to use useGPUNodes hook
  for GPU counts instead of non-existent ClusterInfo.gpuCount
- GPU counts now properly aggregate from GPU node data filtered
  by selected clusters

This fixes the UI not loading due to TypeScript compilation errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
